transitions.name: validate_raw_data
transitions.description: Validate the ingested raw data for completeness and correctness.
transitions.start_state_description: Data has been ingested and is ready for validation.
transitions.end_state_description: Raw data has been validated successfully.

criteria.name: raw_data_validation_trigger
criteria.description: Triggered after the raw data is ingested.

process.name: validate_ingested_raw_data
process.description: Process to validate the ingested raw data.

criteria.description: Triggered by the completion of the raw data validation.
criteria.name: data_transformation_trigger

transitions.description: Transform retrieved raw data into standardized format.
transitions.name: transform_data

process.description: Process to transform the ingested raw data.
process.name: transform_ingested_data

transitions.start_state_description: Raw data has been validated and is ready for transformation.
